title: phanera retusa
intro: Phanera retusa, also known as the Red Vanda or Vanda retusa, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. This terrestrial orchid is known for its bright red and white flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phanera retusa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also made into capsules or tablets for oral consumption.
